"data_instructions": {
"payload_shape": "flat_series",
"orientation": "time",
"entity_dim": "panel",
"selection_dim": "time-bucket",
"selection_role": "produces",
"binding": {
"asset_id": "PCC-Panel-1",
"table": "pcc_panel_1_feedbacks",
"ts_col": "timestamp",
"panel_id": null,
"nameplate_scope": "default"
},
"window": {
"lookback": "this-month",
"sampling": "hourly",
"time_mode": "choice"
},
"fetch": {
"endpoint": "power-quality-summary",
"window_seconds": null,
"interval_seconds": null,
"sample_count": null,
"range": "this-month",
"start": null,
"end": null,
"sampling": "hourly",
"metrics": [
"thd_current_r_pct",
"thd_current_y_pct",
"thd_current_b_pct",
"thd_voltage_r_pct",
"thd_voltage_y_pct",
"thd_voltage_b_pct",
"sag_event_active",
"swell_event_active",
"neutral_stress_event_active",
"power_factor_total"
],
"selection": null
},
"fields": [],
"roster": [
{
"slot": "timeline.periods[*].panels[]",
"scope": "members",
"element": {
"h3": {
"b": "null",
"why": "no 3rd-harmonic column on gic_*"
},
"h5": {
"b": "col",
"c": "harmonic_5th_pct",
"r": 2
},
"h7": {
"b": "col",
"c": "harmonic_7th_pct",
"r": 2
},
"id": {
"a": "name",
"b": "slug"
},
"kw": {
"b": "col",
"c": "active_power_total_kw",
"q": "power",
"r": 2
},
"pf": {
"b": "prefer_abs",
"r": 3,
"cs": [
"kpi_true_pf",
"power_factor_total"
]
},
"iThd": {
"b": "phase_mean",
"r": 2,
"cs": [
"thd_current_r_pct",
"thd_current_y_pct",
"thd_current_b_pct"
]
},
"vThd": {
"b": "phase_mean",
"r": 2,
"cs": [
"thd_voltage_r_pct",
"thd_voltage_y_pct",
"thd_voltage_b_pct"
]
},
"panel": {
"a": "name",
"b": "attr"
},
"pfGap": {
"b": "col",
"c": "pf_gap_vs_full_load",
"r": 2
},
"table": {
"a": "table",
"b": "attr"
},
"driver": {
"b": "null",
"why": "diagnosis label is not a neuract column"
},
"iThdPk": {
"b": "null",
"why": "no peak-THD column on gic_*"
},
"status": {
"b": "status",
"vocab": [
"success",
"warning",
"danger"
],
"policy": "pf_floors"
},
"truePf": {
"b": "col",
"c": "kpi_true_pf",
"r": 3
},
"kFactor": {
"b": "null",
"why": "no k-factor column on gic_*"
},
"neutralA": {
"b": "col",
"c": "current_neutral",
"r": 1
},
"driverKey": {
"b": "null",
"why": "diagnosis label is not a neuract column"
}
},
"role_filter": "load",
"reporting_only": true
}
]
},
"answerability": "partial",
"data_note": "Showing per-panel THD and event counts from outgoing feeders; voltage THD (vThd) is not measured for this asset's feeders, so V-THD lines and panels are blank."
}

driver.why: diagnosis label is not a neuract column

driverKey.why: diagnosis label is not a neuract column

why: Mechanism A: 14,614-tok emit, morphs = zero-filled periods[*].panels harmonic grid
